center.name: Bhigwan
center.summary: Bhigwan是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Grey francolin、红脚苦恶鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey francolin (Ortygornis pondicerianus) is a species of francolin found in the plains and drier parts of the Indian subcontinent and Iran

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown crake (Zapornia akool), or brown bush-hen, is a waterbird in the rail and crake family (Rallidae) found in South Asia
